aiTitle: Chisel IR 序列化器讲义生成

content.content:
1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
2	
3	package chisel3.internal.firrtl
4	
5	import chisel3.{Placeholder => _, _}
6	import chisel3.experimental.{
7	  Analog,
8	  BaseModule,
9	  HasTypeAlias,
10	  NoSourceInfo,
11	  SourceInfo,
12	  SourceLine,
13	  UnlocatableSourceInfo
14	}
15	import chisel3.properties.Property
16	import firrtl.{ir => fir}
17	import firrtl.annotations.{Annotation, JsonProtocol}
18	import chisel3.internal.{castToInt, throwException, HasId}
19	import chisel3.internal.firrtl.ir._
20	import chisel3.EnumType
21	import scala.annotation.tailrec
22	import scala.collection.immutable.{Queue, VectorBuilder, VectorMap}
23	
24	private[chisel3] object Serializer {
25	  private val NewLine = '\n'
26	  private val Indent = "  "
27	
28	  // The version supported by the serializer.
29	  val version = "7.0.0"
30	
31	  def getRef(id: HasId, sourceInfo: SourceInfo): Arg =
32	    id.getOptionRef.getOrElse {
33	      val module = id._parent.map(m => s" '$id' was defined in module '$m'.").getOrElse("")
34	      val loc = sourceInfo.makeMessage(" " + _)
35	      reportInternalError(s"Could not get ref for '$id'$loc!$module")
36	    }
37	
38	  /** Generate a legal FIRRTL name. */
39	  private def legalize(name: String): String = name match {
40	    // If the name starts with a digit, then escape it with backticks.
41	    case _ if name.head.isDigit => s"`$name`"
42	    case _                      => name
43	  }
44	
45	  /** create a new line with the appropriate indent */
46	  private def newLineAndIndent(inc: Int = 0)(implicit b: StringBuilder, indent: Int): Unit = {
47	    b += NewLine; doIndent(inc)
48	  }
49	
50	  private def newLineNoIndent()(implicit b: StringBuilder): Unit = b += NewLine
51	
52	  /** create indent, inc allows for a temporary increment */
53	  private def doIndent(inc: Int = 0)(implicit b: StringBuilder, indent: Int): Unit = {
54	    (0 until (indent + inc)).foreach { _ => b ++= Indent }
55	  }
56	
57	  /** Serialize the given text as a "quoted" string. */
58	  private def quote(text: String)(implicit b: StringBuilder): Unit = {
59	    b ++= "\""
60	    b ++= text
61	    b ++= "\""
62	  }
63	
64	  // TODO use makeMessage to get ':' filename col separator instead of space
65	  // Can we optimize the escaping?
66	  private def serialize(info: SourceInfo)(implicit b: StringBuilder, suppressSourceInfo: Boolean): Unit =
67	    info match {
68	      case sl: SourceLine if !suppressSourceInfo =>
69	        b ++= " @["; b ++= fir.FileInfo.fromUnescaped(sl.serialize).escaped; b ++= "]"
70	      case _ => ()
71	    }
72	
73	  private def reportInternalError(msg: String): Nothing = {
74	    val link = "https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/issues/new"
75	    val fullMsg = s"Internal Error! $msg This is a bug in Chisel, please file an issue at '$link'"
76	    throwException(fullMsg)
77	  }
78	
79	  private def clonedModuleIOError(mod: BaseModule, name: String, sourceInfo: SourceInfo): Nothing = {
80	    val loc = sourceInfo.makeMessage(" " + _)
81	    reportInternalError(s"Trying to convert a cloned IO of $mod inside of $mod itself$loc!")
82	  }
83	
84	  // TODO modeled on unpack method on Printable, refactor?
85	  // Cannot just use Printable.unpack because it doesn't work right with nested expressions
86	  def unpack(pable: Printable, ctx: Component, sourceInfo: SourceInfo): (String, Seq[Arg]) = {
87	    implicit val info: SourceInfo = sourceInfo
88	    val resolved = Printable.resolve(pable, ctx)
89	    val (fmt, data) = resolved.unpack
90	    (fmt, data.map(_.ref))
91	  }
92	
93	  private def serializeArgs(args: Seq[Arg], ctx: Component, info: SourceInfo)(implicit b: StringBuilder): Unit = {
94	    var first = true
95	    args.foreach { a =>
96	      if (!first) {
97	        b ++= ", "
98	      }
99	      first = false
100	      serialize(a, ctx, info)
101	    }
102	  }
103	
104	  private def serializePrim(op: PrimOp, args: Seq[Arg], sourceInfo: SourceInfo, ctx: Component)(
105	    implicit b: StringBuilder
106	  ): Unit = {
107	    b ++= op.name; b += '('
108	    val last = args.size - 1
109	    args.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (arg, idx) =>
110	      serialize(arg, ctx, sourceInfo)
111	      if (idx != last) { b ++= ", " }
112	    }
113	    b += ')'
114	  }
115	
116	  private def serialize(arg: Arg, ctx: Component, info: SourceInfo)(implicit b: StringBuilder): Unit = arg match {
117	    case Node(id)  => serialize(getRef(id, info), ctx, info)
118	    case Ref(name) => b ++= name
119	    // We don't need to legalize Slot names, firtool can parse subfields starting with digits
120	    case Slot(imm, name) => serialize(imm, ctx, info); b += '.'; b ++= legalize(name)
121	    case OpaqueSlot(imm) => serialize(imm, ctx, info)
122	    case LitIndex(imm, idx) =>
123	      serialize(imm, ctx, info); b += '['; b ++= idx.toString; b += ']'
124	    case Index(imm, ILit(idx)) =>
125	      serialize(imm, ctx, info); b += '['; b ++= castToInt(idx, "Index").toString; b += ']'
126	    case Index(imm, value) =>
127	      serialize(imm, ctx, info); b += '['; serialize(value, ctx, info); b += ']'
128	    case ModuleIO(mod, name) =>
129	      if (mod eq ctx.id) { b ++= name }
130	      else { b ++= getRef(mod, info).name; b += '.'; b ++= name }
131	    case ModuleCloneIO(mod, name) =>
132	      if (mod eq ctx.id) clonedModuleIOError(mod, name, info)
133	      else { b ++= name }
134	    case u @ ULit(n, w) =>
135	      val width = w match {
136	        case UnknownWidth => u.minWidth
137	        case w: KnownWidth => w.value
138	      }
139	      b ++= "UInt<"; b ++= width.toString; b ++= ">(0h"; b ++= n.toString(16); b += ')'
140	    case s @ SLit(n, w) =>
141	      val width = w match {
142	        case UnknownWidth => s.minWidth
143	        case w: KnownWidth => w.value
144	      }
145	      b ++= "SInt<"; b ++= width.toString; b ++= ">("
146	      if (n < 0) { b += '-' }
147	      b ++= "0h"; b ++= n.abs.toString(16); b += ')'
148	    case lit: ILit => b ++= lit.n.toString
149	    case PropertyLit(tpe, lit) =>
150	      // TODO can we not use FIRRTL types here?
151	      b ++= fir.Serializer.serialize(tpe.convert(lit, ctx, info))
152	    case e @ ProbeExpr(probe) =>
153	      b ++= "probe("; serialize(probe, ctx, info); b += ')'
154	    case e @ RWProbeExpr(probe) =>
155	      b ++= "rwprobe("; serialize(probe, ctx, info); b += ')'
156	    case e @ ProbeRead(probe) =>
157	      b ++= "read("; serialize(probe, ctx, info); b += ')'
158	    case PropExpr(_, tpe, op, args) =>
159	      b ++= op.toString; b += '('; serializeArgs(args, ctx, info); b += ')'
160	    case DomainSubfield(_, domain, fieldName, _) =>
161	      serialize(domain, ctx, info); b += '.'; b ++= fieldName
162	    case e: PrimExpr[_] =>
163	      serializePrim(e.op, e.args, info, ctx)
164	    case other =>
165	      throw new InternalErrorException(s"Unexpected type in convert $other")
166	  }
167	
168	  private def serializeIntrinsic(
169	    ctx:         Component,
170	    info:        SourceInfo,
171	    name:        Option[String],
172	    id:          Option[Data],
173	    intrinsic:   String,
174	    args:        Seq[Arg],
175	    params:      Seq[(String, Param)],
176	    typeAliases: Seq[String]
177	  )(implicit b: StringBuilder, suppressSourceInfo: Boolean): Unit = {
178	    if (name.nonEmpty) {
179	      b ++= "node "; b ++= legalize(name.get); b ++= " = "
180	    }
181	    b ++= "intrinsic("; b ++= intrinsic;
182	    if (params.nonEmpty) {
183	      b += '<';
184	      val lastIdx = params.size - 1
185	      params.zipWithIndex.foreach { case ((name, param), idx) =>
186	        serialize(name, param)
187	        if (idx != lastIdx) b ++= ", "
188	      }
189	      b += '>'
190	    }
191	    if (id.nonEmpty) {
192	      b ++= " : "
193	      serializeType(id.get, info, typeAliases)
194	    }
195	    if (args.nonEmpty) {
196	      b ++= ", "
197	      serializeArgs(args, ctx, info)
198	    }
199	    b += ')'
200	    serialize(info)
201	  }
202	
203	  /** Serialize Commands */
204	  private def serializeSimpleCommand(cmd: Command, ctx: Component, typeAliases: Seq[String])(
205	    implicit b:         StringBuilder,
206	    indent:             Int,
207	    suppressSourceInfo: Boolean
208	  ): Unit = cmd match {
209	    case e: DefPrim[_] =>
210	      b ++= "node "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " = ";
211	      serializePrim(e.op, e.args, e.sourceInfo, ctx)
212	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
213	    case e @ DefWire(info, id) =>
214	      b ++= "wire "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " : "; serializeType(id, info, typeAliases)
215	      val associations = ctx.id match {
216	        case rm: RawModule => rm.getAssociations(id)
217	        case _ => Seq.empty[domain.Type]
218	      }
219	      if (associations.nonEmpty) {
220	        b ++= " domains ["
221	        associations.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (assoc, i) =>
222	          if (i > 0) b ++= ", "
223	          b ++= legalize(getRef(assoc, UnlocatableSourceInfo).name)
224	        }
225	        b ++= "]"
226	      }
227	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
228	    case e @ DefReg(info, id, clock) =>
229	      b ++= "reg "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " : "; serializeType(id, info, typeAliases);
230	      b ++= ", "; serialize(clock, ctx, info)
231	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
232	    case e @ DefRegInit(info, id, clock, reset, init) =>
233	      b ++= "regreset "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " : "; serializeType(id, info, typeAliases);
234	      b ++= ", "; serialize(clock, ctx, info)
235	      b ++= ", "; serialize(reset, ctx, info)
236	      b ++= ", "; serialize(init, ctx, info);
237	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
238	    case e @ DefMemory(info, id, t, size) =>
239	      b ++= "cmem "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " : "; serializeType(t, info, typeAliases);
240	      b += '['; b ++= size.toString; b += ']'; serialize(e.sourceInfo)
241	    case e @ DefSeqMemory(info, id, t, size, ruw) =>
242	      b ++= "smem "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " : "; serializeType(t, info, typeAliases);
243	      b += '['; b ++= size.toString; b += ']';
244	      if (ruw != fir.ReadUnderWrite.Undefined) { // undefined is the default
245	        b ++= ", "; b ++= ruw.toString
246	      }
247	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
248	    case e @ FirrtlMemory(
249	          info,
250	          id,
251	          t,
252	          size,
253	          readPortNames,
254	          writePortNames,
255	          readwritePortNames,
256	          readLatency,
257	          writeLatency
258	        ) =>
259	      b ++= "mem "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " :"; serialize(e.sourceInfo); newLineAndIndent(1)
260	      b ++= "data-type => "; serializeType(t, info, typeAliases); newLineAndIndent(1)
261	      b ++= "depth => "; b ++= size.toString; newLineAndIndent(1)
262	      b ++= "read-latency => "; b ++= readLatency.toString; newLineAndIndent(1)
263	      b ++= "write-latency => "; b ++= writeLatency.toString; newLineAndIndent(1)
264	      readPortNames.foreach { r => b ++= "reader => "; b ++= legalize(r); newLineAndIndent(1) }
265	      writePortNames.foreach { w => b ++= "writer => "; b ++= legalize(w); newLineAndIndent(1) }
266	      readwritePortNames.foreach { r => b ++= "readwriter => "; b ++= legalize(r); newLineAndIndent(1) }
267	      b ++= "read-under-write => undefined"
268	    case e: DefMemPort[_] =>
269	      b ++= e.dir.toString; b ++= " mport "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " = "; b ++= legalize(e.source.fullName(ctx))
270	      b += '['; serialize(e.index, ctx, e.sourceInfo); b += ']'; b ++= ", "; serialize(e.clock, ctx, e.sourceInfo);
271	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
272	    case Connect(info, loc, exp) =>
273	      b ++= "connect "; serialize(loc, ctx, info); b ++= ", "; serialize(exp, ctx, info); serialize(info)
274	    case PropAssign(info, loc, exp) =>
275	      b ++= "propassign "; serialize(loc, ctx, info); b ++= ", "; serialize(exp, ctx, info); serialize(info)
276	    case PropertyAssert(info, cond, msg) =>
277	      b ++= "propassert "; serialize(cond, ctx, info); b ++= ", \""; b ++= msg; b += '"'; serialize(info)
278	    case Attach(info, locs) =>
279	      b ++= "attach ("
280	      serializeArgs(locs, ctx, info)
281	      b += ')'; serialize(info)
282	    case DefInvalid(info, arg) =>
283	      b ++= "invalidate "; serialize(arg, ctx, info); serialize(info)
284	    case e @ DefInstance(info, id, _) =>
285	      b ++= "inst "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " of "; b ++= legalize(id.name); serialize(e.sourceInfo)
286	    case e @ DefInstanceChoice(info, _, default, option, choices) =>
287	      b ++= "instchoice "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " of "; b ++= legalize(default.name);
288	      b ++= ", "; b ++= legalize(option); b ++= " : "; serialize(e.sourceInfo)
289	      choices.foreach { case (choice, module) =>
290	        newLineAndIndent(1)
291	        b ++= legalize(choice); b ++= " => "; b ++= legalize(module.name)
292	      }
293	    case e @ DefObject(info, _, className) =>
294	      b ++= "object "; b ++= legalize(e.name); b ++= " of "; b ++= legalize(className); serialize(e.sourceInfo)
295	    case e @ Stop(_, info, clock, ret) =>
296	      b ++= "stop("; serialize(clock, ctx, info); b ++= ", UInt<1>(0h1), "; b ++= ret.toString; b += ')';
297	      val lbl = e.name
298	      if (lbl.nonEmpty) { b ++= " : "; b ++= legalize(lbl) }
299	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
300	    case e @ Printf(_, info, filename, clock, pable) =>
301	      val (fmt, args) = unpack(pable, ctx, info)
302	      if (filename.isEmpty) b ++= "printf("; else b ++= "fprintf(";
303	      serialize(clock, ctx, info); b ++= ", UInt<1>(0h1), ";
304	      filename.foreach { fable =>
305	        val (ffmt, fargs) = unpack(fable, ctx, info)
306	        b ++= fir.StringLit(ffmt).escape; b ++= ", "
307	        fargs.foreach { a => serialize(a, ctx, info); b ++= ", " }
308	      }
309	      b ++= fir.StringLit(fmt).escape;
310	      args.foreach { a => b ++= ", "; serialize(a, ctx, info) }; b += ')'
311	      val lbl = e.name
312	      if (lbl.nonEmpty) { b ++= " : "; b ++= legalize(lbl) }
313	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
314	    case e @ Flush(info, filename, clock) =>
315	      b ++= "fflush("; serialize(clock, ctx, info); b ++= ", UInt<1>(0h1)";
316	      filename.foreach { fable =>
317	        val (ffmt, fargs) = unpack(fable, ctx, info)
318	        b ++= ", "; b ++= fir.StringLit(ffmt).escape
319	        fargs.foreach { a => b ++= ", "; serialize(a, ctx, info) }
320	      }
321	      b += ')'; serialize(info)
322	    case e @ ProbeDefine(sourceInfo, sink, probeExpr) =>
323	      b ++= "define "; serialize(sink, ctx, sourceInfo); b ++= " = "; serialize(probeExpr, ctx, sourceInfo);
324	      serialize(sourceInfo)
325	    case e @ ProbeForceInitial(sourceInfo, probe, value) =>
326	      b ++= "force_initial("; serialize(probe, ctx, sourceInfo); b ++= ", "; serialize(value, ctx, sourceInfo);
327	      b += ')'; serialize(sourceInfo)
328	    case e @ ProbeReleaseInitial(sourceInfo, probe) =>
329	      b ++= "release_initial("; serialize(probe, ctx, sourceInfo); b += ')'; serialize(sourceInfo)
330	    case e @ ProbeForce(sourceInfo, clock, cond, probe, value) =>
331	      b ++= "force("; serializeArgs(Seq(clock, cond, probe, value), ctx, sourceInfo); b += ')'; serialize(sourceInfo)
332	    case e @ ProbeRelease(sourceInfo, clock, cond, probe) =>
333	      b ++= "release("; serializeArgs(Seq(clock, cond, probe), ctx, sourceInfo); b += ')'; serialize(sourceInfo)
334	    case e @ Verification(_, op, info, clk, pred, pable) =>
335	      val (fmt, args) = unpack(pable, ctx, info)
336	      b ++= op.toString; b += '('; serializeArgs(Seq(clk, pred), ctx, info); b ++= ", UInt<1>(0h1), ";
337	      b ++= fir.StringLit(fmt).escape;
338	      args.foreach { a => b ++= ", "; serialize(a, ctx, info) }; b += ')'
339	      val lbl = e.name
340	      if (lbl.nonEmpty) { b ++= " : "; b ++= legalize(lbl) }
341	      serialize(e.sourceInfo)
342	    case i @ DefIntrinsic(info, intrinsic, args, params) =>
343	      serializeIntrinsic(ctx, info, None, None, intrinsic, args, params, typeAliases)
344	    case i @ DefIntrinsicExpr(info, intrinsic, id, args, params) =>
345	      serializeIntrinsic(ctx, info, Some(i.name), Some(id), intrinsic, args, params, typeAliases)
346	    case FirrtlComment(text) =>
347	      // Because of split, iterator will always be non-empty even if text is empty
348	      val it = text.split("\n").iterator
349	      while ({
350	        val line = it.next()
351	        b ++= "; "; b ++= line
352	        if (it.hasNext) {
353	          newLineAndIndent()
354	        }
355	        it.hasNext
356	      }) ()
357	    case e @ DomainDefine(info, sink, source) =>
358	      b ++= "domain_define "
359	      serialize(sink, ctx, info)
360	      b ++= " = "
361	      serialize(source, ctx, info);
362	      serialize(info)
363	    case e @ DomainInstance(info, id, domain, properties) =>
364	      b ++= "domain "
365	      b ++= id.getRef.name
366	      b ++= " of "
367	      b ++= domain.name
368	      b += '('
369	      properties.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (prop, idx) =>
370	        if (idx > 0) b ++= ", "
371	        serialize(prop, ctx, info)
372	      }
373	      b += ')'
374	      serialize(info)
375	  }
376	
377	  private def serializeCommand(cmd: Command, ctx: Component, typeAliases: Seq[String])(
378	    implicit indent:    Int,
379	    suppressSourceInfo: Boolean
380	  ): Iterator[String] = {
381	    cmd match {
382	      case When(info, pred, ifRegion, elseRegion) =>
383	        val start = {
384	          implicit val b = new StringBuilder
385	          doIndent(); b ++= "when "; serialize(pred, ctx, info); b ++= " :"; serialize(info)
386	          newLineNoIndent()
387	          Iterator(b.toString)
388	        }
389	        val middle =
390	          if (ifRegion.isEmpty) {
391	            implicit val b = new StringBuilder
392	            doIndent(1); b ++= "skip"
393	            newLineNoIndent()
394	            Iterator(b.toString)
395	          } else {
396	            ifRegion.flatMap(serializeCommand(_, ctx, typeAliases)(indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo))
397	          }
398	        val end = if (elseRegion.nonEmpty) {
399	          implicit val b = new StringBuilder
400	          doIndent(); b ++= "else :"
401	          newLineNoIndent()
402	          Iterator(b.toString) ++ elseRegion.flatMap(
403	            serializeCommand(_, ctx, typeAliases)(indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo)
404	          )
405	        } else Iterator.empty
406	        start ++ middle ++ end
407	      case LayerBlock(info, layer, region) =>
408	        val start = {
409	          implicit val b = new StringBuilder
410	          doIndent(); b ++= "layerblock "; b ++= layer; b ++= " :"; serialize(info)
411	          newLineNoIndent()
412	          Iterator(b.toString)
413	        }
414	        start ++ region.iterator.flatMap(serializeCommand(_, ctx, typeAliases)(indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo))
415	      case Placeholder(_, block) =>
416	        if (block.isEmpty) {
417	          implicit val b = new StringBuilder
418	          doIndent(); b ++= "skip"
419	          newLineNoIndent()
420	          Iterator(b.toString)
421	        } else {
422	          block.iterator.flatMap(serializeCommand(_, ctx, typeAliases)(indent, suppressSourceInfo))
423	        }
424	      case cmd @ DefContract(info, names, exprs) =>
425	        val start = {
426	          implicit val b = new StringBuilder
427	          doIndent()
428	          b ++= "contract"
429	          if (names.nonEmpty) {
430	            b ++= names.map(_.getRef.name).mkString(" ", ", ", "")
431	            b ++= " = "
432	            exprs.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (expr, idx) =>
433	              if (idx > 0) b ++= ", "
434	              serialize(expr, ctx, info)
435	            }
436	          }
437	          b ++= " :"
438	          serialize(info)
439	          newLineNoIndent()
440	          Iterator(b.toString)
441	        }
442	        start ++ cmd.region
443	          .getAllCommands()
444	          .flatMap(serializeCommand(_, ctx, typeAliases)(indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo))
445	      // TODO can we avoid checking 4 less common Commands every single time?
446	      case simple =>
447	        // TODO avoid Iterator boxing for every simple command
448	        implicit val b = new StringBuilder
449	        doIndent()
450	        serializeSimpleCommand(simple, ctx, typeAliases)
451	        newLineNoIndent()
452	        Iterator(b.toString)
453	    }
454	  }
455	
456	  /** Serialize Chisel IR Block into FIRRTL Statements
457	    *
458	    * @note ctx is needed because references to ports translate differently when referenced within
459	    *   the module in which they are defined vs. parent modules
460	    * @param block Chisel IR Block to convert
461	    * @param ctx Component (Module) context within which we are translating
462	    * @param typeAliases Set of aliased type names to emit FIRRTL alias types for
463	    * @return Iterator[String] of the equivalent FIRRTL text
464	    */
465	  private def serialize(block: Block, ctx: Component, typeAliases: Seq[String])(
466	    implicit indent:    Int,
467	    suppressSourceInfo: Boolean
468	  ): Iterator[String] = {
469	    val commands = block.getCommands()
470	    val secretCommands = block.getSecretCommands()
471	    if (commands.isEmpty && secretCommands.isEmpty) {
472	      implicit val b = new StringBuilder
473	      doIndent(); b ++= "skip"
474	      newLineNoIndent()
475	      return Iterator(b.toString)
476	    } else {
477	      Iterator.empty[String] ++ (commands.iterator ++ secretCommands).flatMap(c =>
478	        serializeCommand(c, ctx, typeAliases)(indent, suppressSourceInfo)
479	      )
480	    }
481	  }
482	
483	  private def serialize(width: Width)(implicit b: StringBuilder): Unit = width match {
484	    case KnownWidth(width) => b += '<'; b ++= width.toString; b += '>'
485	    case UnknownWidth      => // empty string
486	  }
487	
488	  private def firrtlUserDirOf(t: Data): SpecifiedDirection = t match {
489	    case t: Vec[_] =>
490	      SpecifiedDirection.fromParent(t.specifiedDirection, firrtlUserDirOf(t.sample_element))
491	    case t: Record if t._isOpaqueType =>
492	      SpecifiedDirection.fromParent(t.specifiedDirection, firrtlUserDirOf(t.elementsIterator.next()))
493	    case t => t.specifiedDirection
494	  }
495	
496	  def serializeType(baseType: Data, info: SourceInfo, typeAliases: Seq[String] = Seq.empty)(
497	    implicit b: StringBuilder
498	  ): Unit =
499	    serializeType(baseType, false, info, true, true, typeAliases)
500	
501	  def serializeType(
502	    baseType:    Data,
503	    clearDir:    Boolean,
504	    info:        SourceInfo,
505	    checkProbe:  Boolean,
506	    checkConst:  Boolean,
507	    typeAliases: Seq[String]
508	  )(implicit b: StringBuilder): Unit = baseType match {
509	    // extract underlying type for probe
510	    case t: Data if (checkProbe && t.probeInfo.nonEmpty) =>
511	      if (t.probeInfo.get.writable) {
512	        b ++= "RWProbe<"
513	      } else {
514	        b ++= "Probe<"
515	      }
516	      serializeType(t, clearDir, info, false, checkConst, typeAliases)
517	      t.probeInfo.get.color.foreach { layer => b ++= s", ${layer.fullName}" }
518	      b += '>'
519	    // extract underlying type for const
520	    // TODO do we need !lastEmittedConst check?
521	    case t: Data if (checkConst && t.isConst) =>
522	      b ++= "const "
523	      serializeType(t, clearDir, info, checkProbe, false, typeAliases)
524	    case _: Clock      => b ++= "Clock"
525	    case _: AsyncReset => b ++= "AsyncReset"
526	    case _: ResetType  => b ++= "Reset"
527	    case t: EnumType   => b ++= "UInt"; serialize(t.width)
528	    case t: UInt       => b ++= "UInt"; serialize(t.width)
529	    case t: SInt       => b ++= "SInt"; serialize(t.width)
530	    case t: Analog     => b ++= "Analog"; serialize(t.width)
531	    case t: Vec[_] =>
532	      val childClearDir = clearDir ||
533	        t.specifiedDirection == SpecifiedDirection.Input || t.specifiedDirection == SpecifiedDirection.Output
534	      // if Vector is a probe, don't emit Probe<...> on its elements
535	      serializeType(t.sample_element, childClearDir, info, checkProbe, checkConst, typeAliases)
536	      b += '['; b ++= t.length.toString; b += ']'
537	    // Handle aliased bundles: Emit an AliasType directly
538	    case t: HasTypeAlias if t.finalizedAlias.exists { typeAliases.contains(_) } =>
539	      b ++= t.finalizedAlias.get
540	    case t: Record => {
541	      val childClearDir = clearDir ||
542	        t.specifiedDirection == SpecifiedDirection.Input || t.specifiedDirection == SpecifiedDirection.Output
543	      // if Record is a probe, don't emit Probe<...> on its elements
544	      def eltField(elt: Data): Unit = {
545	        (childClearDir, firrtlUserDirOf(elt)) match {
546	          case (false, SpecifiedDirection.Flip | SpecifiedDirection.Input) =>
547	            b ++= "flip "
548	          case _ => ()
549	        }
550	        b ++= legalize(getRef(elt, info).name); b ++= " : "
551	        serializeType(elt, childClearDir, info, checkProbe, true, typeAliases)
552	      }
553	      if (!t._isOpaqueType) {
554	        b ++= "{ "
555	        var first = true
556	        t._elements.toIndexedSeq.reverse.map { case (_, e) =>
557	          if (!first) {
558	            b ++= ", "
559	          }
560	          first = false
561	          eltField(e)
562	        }
563	        b += '}'
564	      } else {
565	        serializeType(t._elements.head._2, childClearDir, info, checkProbe, true, typeAliases)
566	      }
567	    }
568	    case t: Property[_] =>
569	      // TODO can we not use FIRRTL types here?
570	      b ++= fir.Serializer.serialize(t.getPropertyType)
571	    case t: domain.Type => b ++= "Domain of "; b ++= t.domain.name;
572	  }
573	
574	  private def serialize(name: String, param: Param)(implicit b: StringBuilder): Unit = param match {
575	    case p: IntParam    => b ++= name; b ++= " = "; b ++= p.value.toString
576	    case p: DoubleParam => b ++= name; b ++= " = "; b ++= p.value.toString
577	    case p: StringParam => b ++= name; b ++= " = "; b ++= firrtl.ir.StringLit(p.value).escape
578	    case p: PrintableParam => {
579	      val ctx = p.context._component.get
580	      val (fmt, _) = unpack(p.value, ctx, UnlocatableSourceInfo)
581	      b ++= name; b ++= " = "; b ++= firrtl.ir.StringLit(fmt).escape
582	    }
583	    case p: RawParam =>
584	      b ++= name; b ++= " = "
585	      b += '\''; b ++= p.value.replace("'", "\\'"); b += '\''
586	  }
587	
588	  private def serialize(param: TestParam)(implicit b: StringBuilder, indent: Int): Unit = param match {
589	    case IntTestParam(value)    => b ++= value.toString
590	    case DoubleTestParam(value) => b ++= value.toString
591	    case StringTestParam(value) => b ++= firrtl.ir.StringLit(value).escape
592	    case ArrayTestParam(value) =>
593	      b ++= "[";
594	      value.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (value, i) =>
595	        if (i > 0) b ++= ", "
596	        serialize(value)
597	      }
598	      b ++= "]"
599	    case MapTestParam(value) =>
600	      b ++= "{"
601	      value.keys.toSeq.sorted.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (name, i) =>
602	        if (i > 0) b ++= ", "
603	        b ++= name; b ++= " = "; serialize(value(name))
604	      }
605	      b ++= "}"
606	  }
607	
608	  private def serialize(
609	    port:        Port,
610	    typeAliases: Seq[String],
611	    topDir:      SpecifiedDirection = SpecifiedDirection.Unspecified
612	  )(implicit b: StringBuilder, indent: Int, suppressSourceInfo: Boolean): Unit = {
613	    val resolvedDir = SpecifiedDirection.fromParent(topDir, firrtlUserDirOf(port.id))
614	    val dir = resolvedDir match {
615	      case SpecifiedDirection.Unspecified | SpecifiedDirection.Output => "output"
616	      case SpecifiedDirection.Flip | SpecifiedDirection.Input         => "input"
617	    }
618	    val clearDir = resolvedDir match {
619	      case SpecifiedDirection.Input | SpecifiedDirection.Output     => true
620	      case SpecifiedDirection.Unspecified | SpecifiedDirection.Flip => false
621	    }
622	    b ++= dir; b += ' '
623	    b ++= legalize(getRef(port.id, port.sourceInfo).name)
624	    b ++= " : "
625	    val tpe = serializeType(port.id, clearDir, port.sourceInfo, true, true, typeAliases)
626	    if (port.associations.nonEmpty) {
627	      b ++= " domains ["
628	      port.associations.zipWithIndex.foreach { case (assoc, i) =>
629	        if (i > 0) b ++= ", "
630	        b ++= legalize(getRef(assoc, UnlocatableSourceInfo).name)
631	      }
632	      b ++= "]"
633	    }
634	    serialize(port.sourceInfo)
635	  }
636	
637	  // TODO what is typeAliases for? Should it be a Set?
638	  private def serialize(component: Component, typeAliases: Seq[String])(
639	    implicit indent:    Int,
640	    suppressSourceInfo: Boolean
641	  ): Iterator[String] = {
642	    component match {
643	      case ctx @ DefModule(id, name, public, layers, ports, block) =>
644	        val start = {
645	          implicit val b = new StringBuilder
646	          doIndent(0)
647	          if (public)
648	            b ++= "public "
649	          b ++= "module "; b ++= legalize(name);
650	          layers.foreach { l => b ++= " enablelayer "; b ++= l.fullName }
651	          b ++= " :"; serialize(id._getSourceLocator)
652	          (ports ++ ctx.secretPorts).foreach { p => newLineAndIndent(1); serialize(p, typeAliases) }
653	          newLineNoIndent() // add a blank line between port declaration and body
654	          newLineNoIndent() // newline for body, serialize(body) will indent
655	          b.toString
656	        }
657	        Iterator(start) ++ serialize(block, ctx, typeAliases)(indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo)
658	
659	      case ctx @ DefBlackBox(id, name, ports, topDir, params, knownLayers, requirements) =>
660	        implicit val b = new StringBuilder
661	        doIndent(0); b ++= "extmodule "; b ++= legalize(name);
662	        if (knownLayers.nonEmpty) {
663	          b ++= knownLayers.map(_.fullName).mkString(" knownlayer ", ", ", "")
664	        }
665	        if (requirements.nonEmpty) {
666	          b ++= requirements.map(r => fir.StringLit(r).escape).mkString(" requires ", ", ", "")
667	        }
668	        b ++= " :"; serialize(id._getSourceLocator)
669	        (ports ++ ctx.secretPorts).foreach { p => newLineAndIndent(1); serialize(p, typeAliases, topDir) }
670	        newLineAndIndent(1); b ++= "defname = "; b ++= id.defName
671	        params.keys.toList.sorted.foreach { name =>
672	          newLineAndIndent(1); b ++= "parameter "; serialize(name, params(name))
673	        }
674	        Iterator(b.toString)
675	
676	      case ctx @ DefIntrinsicModule(id, name, ports, topDir, params) =>
677	        implicit val b = new StringBuilder
678	        doIndent(0); b ++= "intmodule "; b ++= legalize(name); b ++= " :"; serialize(id._getSourceLocator)
679	        (ports ++ ctx.secretPorts).foreach { p => newLineAndIndent(1); serialize(p, typeAliases, topDir) }
680	        newLineAndIndent(1); b ++= "intrinsic = "; b ++= id.intrinsic
681	        params.keys.toList.sorted.foreach { name =>
682	          newLineAndIndent(1); b ++= "parameter "; serialize(name, params(name))
683	        }
684	        Iterator(b.toString)
685	
686	      case ctx @ DefClass(id, name, ports, block) =>
687	        val start = {
688	          implicit val b = new StringBuilder
689	          doIndent(0); b ++= "class "; b ++= name; b ++= " :"; serialize(id._getSourceLocator)
690	          (ports ++ ctx.secretPorts).foreach { p => newLineAndIndent(1); serialize(p, typeAliases) }
691	          newLineNoIndent() // add a blank line between port declaration and body
692	          newLineNoIndent() // newline for body, serialize(body) will indent
693	          b.toString
694	        }
695	        Iterator(start) ++ serialize(block, ctx, typeAliases)(indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo)
696	
697	      case ctx @ DefTestMarker(kind, name, module, params, sourceInfo) =>
698	        implicit val b = new StringBuilder
699	        doIndent(0); b ++= kind.toString; b ++= " "; b ++= legalize(name); b ++= " of "; b ++= legalize(module.name);
700	        b ++= " :";
701	        serialize(sourceInfo)
702	        params.value.keys.toSeq.sorted.foreach { case name =>
703	          newLineAndIndent(1); b ++= name; b ++= " = "; serialize(params.value(name))
704	        }
705	        Iterator(b.toString)
706	    }
707	  }
708	
709	  private def serialize(layer: Layer)(implicit b: StringBuilder, indent: Int, suppressSourceInfo: Boolean): Unit = {
710	    newLineAndIndent()
711	    b ++= "layer "
712	    b ++= layer.name
713	    b ++= ", "
714	    layer.config match {
715	      case LayerConfig.Extract(outputDir) =>
716	        b ++= "bind"
717	        outputDir match {
718	          case Some(d) =>
719	            b ++= ", "
720	            quote(d)
721	          case None => ()
722	        }
723	      case LayerConfig.Inline =>
724	        b ++= "inline"
725	    }
726	    b ++= " :"
727	    serialize(layer.sourceInfo)
728	    layer.children.foreach(serialize(_)(b, indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo))
729	  }
730	
731	  private def serialize(layers: Seq[Layer])(implicit indent: Int, suppressSourceInfo: Boolean): Iterator[String] = {
732	    if (layers.nonEmpty) {
733	      implicit val b = new StringBuilder
734	      layers.foreach(serialize(_)(b, indent, suppressSourceInfo))
735	      newLineNoIndent()
736	      Iterator(b.toString)
737	    } else Iterator.empty
738	  }
739	
740	  private def serialize(ta: DefTypeAlias)(implicit b: StringBuilder, indent: Int): Unit = {
741	    b ++= "type "; b ++= ta.name; b ++= " = "
742	    b ++= fir.Serializer.serialize(ta.underlying) // TODO can we not use FIRRTL types here?
743	    // serialize(ta.sourceInfo) TODO: Uncomment once firtool accepts infos for type aliases
744	  }
745	
746	  private def serialize(fieldType: domain.Field.Type)(implicit b: StringBuilder, indent: Int): Unit = {
747	    b ++= {
748	      fieldType match {
749	        case domain.Field.Boolean => "Bool"
750	        case domain.Field.Integer => "Integer"
751	        case domain.Field.String  => "String"
752	      }
753	    }
754	  }
755	
756	  private def serialize(domain: Domain)(implicit b: StringBuilder, indent: Int): Unit = {
757	    newLineAndIndent()
758	    b ++= "domain "
759	    b ++= domain.name
760	    b ++= " :"
761	    domain.fields.map { case (name, tpe) =>
762	      newLineAndIndent(1)
763	      b ++= name
764	      b ++= " : "
765	      serialize(tpe)
766	    }
767	    newLineNoIndent()
768	  }
769	
770	  private def serializeDomains(domains: Seq[Domain])(implicit indent: Int): Iterator[String] = {
771	    if (domains.isEmpty)
772	      return Iterator.empty
773	
774	    implicit val b = new StringBuilder
775	    domains.foreach(serialize)
776	    newLineNoIndent()
777	    Iterator(b.toString)
778	  }

780	  // TODO make Annotation serialization lazy
781	  private def serialize(circuit: Circuit, annotations: Seq[Annotation]): Iterator[String] = {
782	    implicit val indent:             Int = 0
783	    implicit val suppressSourceInfo: Boolean = circuit.suppressSourceInfo
784	    val prelude = {
785	      implicit val b = new StringBuilder
786	      b ++= s"FIRRTL version $version\n"
787	      b ++= "circuit "; b ++= legalize(circuit.name); b ++= " :";
788	      if (annotations.nonEmpty) {
789	        b ++= "%["; b ++= JsonProtocol.serialize(annotations); b ++= "]";
790	      }
791	      Iterator(b.toString)
792	    }
793	    val options = if (circuit.options.nonEmpty) {
794	      implicit val b = new StringBuilder
795	      circuit.options.foreach { optGroup =>
796	        newLineAndIndent(1)
797	        b ++= s"option ${optGroup.name} :"
798	        serialize(optGroup.sourceInfo)
799	        optGroup.cases.foreach { optCase =>
800	          newLineAndIndent(2)
801	          b ++= optCase.name
802	          serialize(optCase.sourceInfo)
803	        }
804	        newLineNoIndent()
805	      }
806	      Iterator(b.toString)
807	    } else Iterator.empty
808	    val typeAliases = if (circuit.typeAliases.nonEmpty) {
809	      implicit val b = new StringBuilder
810	      circuit.typeAliases.foreach(ta => { b += NewLine; doIndent(1); serialize(ta) })
811	      b += NewLine
812	      Iterator(b.toString)
813	    } else Iterator.empty
814	    val layers = serialize(circuit.layers)(indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo)
815	    val domains = serializeDomains(circuit.domains)(indent + 1)
816	    // TODO what is typeAliases for? Should it be a Set?
817	    val typeAliasesSeq: Seq[String] = circuit.typeAliases.map(_.name)
818	    prelude ++
819	      options ++
820	      typeAliases ++
821	      layers ++
822	      domains ++
823	      circuit.components.iterator.zipWithIndex.flatMap { case (m, i) =>
824	        val newline = Iterator(if (i == 0) s"$NewLine" else s"${NewLine}${NewLine}")
825	        newline ++ serialize(m, typeAliasesSeq)(indent + 1, suppressSourceInfo)
826	      } ++
827	      Iterator(s"$NewLine")
828	  }
829	
830	  def lazily(circuit: Circuit, annotations: Seq[Annotation]): Iterable[String] = new Iterable[String] {
831	    def iterator = serialize(circuit, annotations)
832	  }
833	}
834

74	  sealed abstract class Arg {
75	    def localName:                      String = name
76	    def contextualName(ctx: Component): String = name
77	    def fullName(ctx:       Component): String = contextualName(ctx)
78	    def name:                           String
79	  }
80	
81	  case class Node(id: HasId) extends Arg {
82	    override def contextualName(ctx: Component): String = id.getOptionRef match {
83	      case Some(arg) => arg.contextualName(ctx)
84	      case None      => id.instanceName
85	    }
86	    override def localName: String = id.getOptionRef match {
87	      case Some(arg) => arg.localName
88	      case None      => id.instanceName
89	    }
90	    def name: String = id.getOptionRef match {
91	      case Some(arg) => arg.name
92	      case None      => id.instanceName
93	    }
94	  }
95	
96	  object Arg {
97	    def earlyLocalName(id: HasId): String = earlyLocalName(id, true)
98	
99	    def earlyLocalName(id: HasId, includeRoot: Boolean): String = id.getOptionRef match {
100	      case Some(Index(Node(imm), Node(value))) =>
101	        s"${earlyLocalName(imm, includeRoot)}[${earlyLocalName(value, includeRoot)}]"
102	      case Some(LitIndex(Node(imm), idx)) => s"${earlyLocalName(imm, includeRoot)}[$idx]"
103	      case Some(Index(Node(imm), arg))    => s"${earlyLocalName(imm, includeRoot)}[${arg.localName}]"
104	      case Some(Slot(Node(imm), name))    => s"${earlyLocalName(imm, includeRoot)}.$name"
105	      case Some(OpaqueSlot(Node(imm)))    => s"${earlyLocalName(imm, includeRoot)}"
106	      case Some(ProbeExpr(Node(ref)))     => s"${earlyLocalName(ref, includeRoot)}"
107	      case Some(RWProbeExpr(Node(ref)))   => s"${earlyLocalName(ref, includeRoot)}"
108	      case Some(ProbeRead(Node(ref)))     => s"${earlyLocalName(ref, includeRoot)}"
109	      case Some(arg) if includeRoot       => arg.name
110	      case None if includeRoot =>
111	        id match {
112	          case data: Data          => data._computeName(Some("?")).get
113	          case obj:  DynamicObject => obj._computeName(Some("?")).get
114	          case _ => "?"
115	        }
116	      case _ => "_" // Used when includeRoot == false
117	    }
118	  }
119	
120	  abstract class LitArg(val num: BigInt, widthArg: Width) extends Arg {
121	    def forcedWidth = widthArg.known
122	    def width:                                   Width = if (forcedWidth) widthArg else Width(minWidth)
123	    override def contextualName(ctx: Component): String = name
124	    // Ensure the node representing this LitArg has a ref to it and a literal binding.
125	    def bindLitArg[T <: Element](elem: T): T = {
126	      elem.bind(ElementLitBinding(this))
127	      elem.setRef(this)
128	      elem
129	    }
130	
131	    /** Provides a mechanism that LitArgs can have their width adjusted.
132	      *
133	      * @param newWidth the new width for this
134	      * @return
135	      */
136	    def cloneWithWidth(newWidth: Width): this.type
137	
138	    /** Provides a mechanism that LitArgs can have their value adjusted.
139	      *
140	      * @param newWidth the new width for this
141	      * @return
142	      */
143	    def cloneWithValue(newValue: BigInt): this.type
144	
145	    protected def minWidth: Int
146	    if (forcedWidth) {
147	      require(
148	        widthArg.get >= minWidth,
149	        s"The literal value ${num} was elaborated with a specified width of ${widthArg.get} bits, but at least ${minWidth} bits are required."
150	      )
151	    }
152	  }
153	
154	  case class ILit(n: BigInt) extends Arg {
155	    def name: String = n.toString
156	  }
157	
158	  case class ULit(n: BigInt, w: Width) extends LitArg(n, w) {
159	    def name:     String = "UInt" + width + "(0h" + num.toString(16) + ")"
160	    def minWidth: Int = (if (w.known) 0 else 1).max(n.bitLength)
161	
162	    def cloneWithWidth(newWidth: Width): this.type = {
163	      ULit(n, newWidth).asInstanceOf[this.type]
164	    }
165	
166	    def cloneWithValue(newValue: BigInt): this.type = ULit(newValue, w).asInstanceOf[this.type]
167	
168	    require(n >= 0, s"UInt literal ${n} is negative")
169	  }
170	
171	  case class SLit(n: BigInt, w: Width) extends LitArg(n, w) {
172	    def name: String = {
173	      val unsigned = if (n < 0) (BigInt(1) << width.get) + n else n
174	      s"asSInt(${ULit(unsigned, width).name})"
175	    }
176	
177	    // Special case for 0 which can be specified to zero-width (but defaults to 1 bit).
178	    def minWidth: Int = if (n == 0 && w.known) 0 else 1 + n.bitLength
179	
180	    def cloneWithWidth(newWidth: Width): this.type = {
181	      SLit(n, newWidth).asInstanceOf[this.type]
182	    }
183	
184	    def cloneWithValue(newValue: BigInt): this.type = SLit(newValue, w).asInstanceOf[this.type]
185	  }
186	
187	  /** Literal property value.
188	    *
189	    * These are not LitArgs, because not all property literals are integers.
190	    */
191	  case class PropertyLit[T, U](propertyType: PropertyTypeclass[_] { type Underlying = U; type Type = T }, lit: U)
192	      extends Arg {
193	    def name:                            String = s"PropertyLit($lit)"
194	    def minWidth:                        Int = 0
195	    def cloneWithWidth(newWidth: Width): this.type = PropertyLit(propertyType, lit).asInstanceOf[this.type]
196	
197	    /** Expose a bindLitArg API for PropertyLit, similar to LitArg.
198	      */
199	    def bindLitArg(elem: Property[T]): Property[T] = {

202	      elem
203	    }
204	  }

206	  /** Property expressions.
207	    *
208	    * Property expressions are conceptually similar to Nodes, but only exist as a tree of Args in-memory.

211	      extends Arg {

213	    // the Arg or use the name in textual FIRRTL. This is always expected to be the exp of a PropAssign, and it would be
214	    // an internal error to request the name.

216	  }

218	  /** Domain subfield access expression.

220	    * Represents accessing a field of a domain port, returning a property value.

228	  ) extends Arg {

237	  case class Ref(name: String) extends Arg
238	
239	  /** Arg for ports of Modules

258	  case class Slot(imm: Arg, name: String) extends Arg {
259	    override def contextualName(ctx: Component): String = {

274	  case class Index(imm: Arg, value: Arg) extends Arg {
275	    def name:                                    String = s"[$value]"

277	    override def localName:                      String = s"${imm.localName}[${value.localName}]"
278	  }

280	  // Like index above, except the index is a literal, used for elements of Vecs
281	  case class LitIndex(imm: Arg, value: Int) extends Arg {

287	  sealed trait ProbeDetails { this: Arg =>
288	    val probe: Arg
289	    override def name: String = s"${probe.name}"
290	  }
291	  case class ProbeExpr(probe: Arg) extends Arg with ProbeDetails
292	  case class RWProbeExpr(probe: Arg) extends Arg with ProbeDetails

295	  sealed abstract class MemPortDirection(name: String) {
296	    override def toString: String = name

298	  object MemPortDirection {
299	    object READ extends MemPortDirection("read")
300	    object WRITE extends MemPortDirection("write")

302	    object INFER extends MemPortDirection("infer")

306	  case class PrimExpr[T <: Data](op: PrimOp, args: Arg*) extends Arg {

364	  case class DefInstanceChoice(
365	    sourceInfo: SourceInfo,
366	    id:         HasId,
367	    default:    BaseModule,
368	    option:     String,
369	    choices:    Seq[(String, BaseModule)]
370	  ) extends Definition

372	
373	  class Placeholder(val sourceInfo: SourceInfo) extends Command {
374	    private var commandBuilder: mutable.Builder[Command, ArraySeq[Command]] = null
375	
376	    private var commands: Seq[Command] = null
377	
378	    private var closed: Boolean = false
379	
380	    private def close(): Unit = {
381	      if (commandBuilder == null)
382	        commands = Seq.empty
383	      else
384	        commands = commandBuilder.result()
385	      closed = true
386	    }
387	
388	    def getBuffer: mutable.Builder[Command, ArraySeq[Command]] = {
389	      require(!closed, "cannot add more commands to a closed Placeholder")
390	      if (commandBuilder == null)
391	        commandBuilder = ArraySeq.newBuilder[Command]
392	      commandBuilder
393	    }
394	
395	  }
396	
397	  object Placeholder {
398	    def unapply(placeholder: Placeholder): Option[(SourceInfo, Seq[Command])] = {
399	      placeholder.close()
400	      Some(
401	        (placeholder.sourceInfo, placeholder.commands)
402	      )
403	    }
404	  }
405	
406	  class Block(val sourceInfo: SourceInfo) {
407	    // While building block, commands go into _commandsBuilder.
408	    private var _commandsBuilder = ArraySeq.newBuilder[Command]
409	
410	    // Once closed, store the resulting Seq in _commands.
411	    private var _commands: Seq[Command] = null
412	
413	    // "Secret" commands go into _secretCommands, which can be added to after
414	    // closing the block and should be emitted after those in _commands.
415	    private var _secretCommands: mutable.ArrayBuffer[Command] = null
416	
417	    private def _closed: Boolean = _commandsBuilder == null
418	
419	    def addCommand(c: Command): Unit = {
420	      require(!_closed, "cannot add more commands after block is closed")
421	      _commandsBuilder += c
422	    }
423	
424	    def appendToPlaceholder[A](placeholder: Placeholder)(thunk: => A): A = {
425	      val oldPoint = _commandsBuilder
426	      _commandsBuilder = placeholder.getBuffer
427	      val result = thunk
428	      _commandsBuilder = oldPoint
429	      result
430	    }
431	
432	    def close() = {
433	      if (_commands == null) {
434	        _commands = _commandsBuilder.result()
435	        _commandsBuilder = null
436	      }
437	    }
438	
439	    def getCommands(): Seq[Command] = {
440	      close()
441	      _commands
442	    }
443	
444	    private[chisel3] def addSecretCommand(c: Command): Unit = {
445	      if (_secretCommands == null)
446	        _secretCommands = new mutable.ArrayBuffer[Command]
447	      _secretCommands += c
448	    }
449	    private[chisel3] def getSecretCommands(): Seq[Command] = {
450	      if (_secretCommands == null)
451	        Seq.empty
452	      else
453	        _secretCommands.toSeq
454	    }
455	    private[chisel3] def getAllCommands(): Seq[Command] = getCommands() ++ getSecretCommands()
456	  }
457	
458	  class When(val sourceInfo: SourceInfo, val pred: Arg) extends Command {
459	    val ifRegion = new Block(sourceInfo)
460	    private var _elseRegion: Block = null
461	    def hasElse:             Boolean = _elseRegion != null
462	    def elseRegion: Block = {
463	      if (_elseRegion == null) {
464	        _elseRegion = new Block(sourceInfo)
465	      }
466	      _elseRegion
467	    }
468	  }
469	
470	  object When {
471	    def unapply(when: When): Option[(SourceInfo, Arg, Seq[Command], Seq[Command])] = {
472	      Some(
473	        (
474	          when.sourceInfo,
475	          when.pred,
476	          when.ifRegion.getAllCommands(),
477	          Option(when._elseRegion).fold(Seq.empty[Command])(_.getAllCommands())
478	        )
479	      )
480	    }
481	  }
482

486	  case class Attach(sourceInfo: SourceInfo, locs: Seq[Node]) extends Command
487	  case class Stop(id: stop.Stop, sourceInfo: SourceInfo, clock: Arg, ret: Int) extends Definition
488

497	    case object Inline extends LayerConfig
498	  }
499

503	    config:      LayerConfig,
504	    children:    Seq[Layer],
505	    chiselLayer: layer.Layer
506	  )
507	
508	  final case class Domain(
509	    sourceInfo: SourceInfo,
510	    name:       String,
511	    fields:     Seq[(String, domain.Field.Type)]
512	  )
513	
514	  class LayerBlock(val sourceInfo: SourceInfo, val layer: chisel3.layer.Layer) extends Command {

517	
518	  object LayerBlock {

521	    }

523	
524	  case class DefContract(sourceInfo: SourceInfo, ids: Seq[Data], exprs: Seq[Arg]) extends Command {
525	    val region = new Block(sourceInfo)

1	// SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0
2	
3	package chisel3
4	
5	import firrtl.annotations.Annotation
6	import firrtl.ir.CircuitWithAnnos
7	import firrtl.options.{CustomFileEmission, Unserializable}
8	import chisel3.experimental.{BaseModule, SourceInfo, UnlocatableSourceInfo}
9	import chisel3.experimental.hierarchy.Definition
10	import chisel3.internal.firrtl.ir.Circuit
11	import chisel3.internal.firrtl.{Converter, Serializer}
12	
13	/** The result of running Chisel elaboration
14	  *
15	  * Provides limited APIs for inspection of the resulting circuit.
16	  */
17	// This is an important interface so let's keep it separate from the implementation.
18	sealed trait ElaboratedCircuit {
19	
20	  /** The name of the circuit, also the name of the top public module */
21	  def name: String
22	
23	  /** The circuit and annotations as a string of FIRRTL IR
24	    *
25	    * This will include annotations passed to Chisel to build the circuit and those created during elaboration.
26	    * For large circuits (> 2 GiB of text) use [[lazilySerialize]].
27	    */
28	  def serialize: String
29	
30	  /** The circuit and annotations as a string of FIRRTL IR
31	    *
32	    * For large circuits (> 2 GiB of text) use [[lazilySerialize]]
33	    *
34	    * @param annotations annotations to include in the FIRRTL IR. No other annotations will be included.
35	    */
36	  def serialize(annotations: Iterable[Annotation]): String
37	
38	  /** The circuit and annotations as a lazy buffer of strings of FIRRTL IR
39	    *
40	    * This will include annotations passed to Chisel to build the circuit and those created during elaboration.
41	    * Serialized lazily to reduce peak memory use and support cicuits larger than 2 GiB.
42	    */
43	  def lazilySerialize: Iterable[String]
44	
45	  /** The circuit and annotations as a lazy buffer of strings of FIRRTL IR
46	    *
47	    * Serialized lazily to reduce peak memory use and support cicuits larger than 2 GiB.
48	    *
49	    * @param annotations annotations to include in the FIRRTL IR. No other annotations will be included.
50	    */
51	  def lazilySerialize(annotations: Iterable[Annotation]): Iterable[String]
52	
53	  /** The annotations created during elaboration of this circuit
54	    *
55	    * This does not include annotations passed to elaboration.
56	    */
57	  def annotations: Iterable[Annotation]
58	
59	  /** The Definition of the top module in the elaborated circuit */
60	  def topDefinition: Definition[BaseModule]
61	
62	  /** The underlying circuit, for private use only */
63	  private[chisel3] def _circuit: Circuit
64	}
65	
66	private class ElaboratedCircuitImpl(circuit: Circuit, initialAnnotations: Seq[Annotation]) extends ElaboratedCircuit {
67	
68	  // Source locator needed for toDefinition
69	  private implicit def sourceInfo: SourceInfo = UnlocatableSourceInfo
70	
71	  override def name: String = circuit.name
72	
73	  override def serialize: String = lazilySerialize.mkString
74	
75	  override def serialize(annotations: Iterable[Annotation]): String = lazilySerialize(annotations).mkString
76	
77	  override def lazilySerialize: Iterable[String] = {
78	    val annotations = (initialAnnotations.view ++ circuit.firrtlAnnotations).flatMap {
79	      case _: Unserializable     => None
80	      case _: CustomFileEmission => None
81	      case a => Some(a)
82	    }.toVector
83	    lazilySerialize(annotations)
84	  }
85	
86	  override def lazilySerialize(annotations: Iterable[Annotation]): Iterable[String] = {
87	    Serializer.lazily(circuit, annotations.toSeq)
88	  }
89	
90	  override def annotations: Iterable[Annotation] = circuit.firrtlAnnotations
91	
92	  // TODO come up with a better way to figure this out than "last"
93	  override def topDefinition: Definition[BaseModule] = circuit.components.last.id.toDefinition
94	
95	  private[chisel3] override def _circuit: Circuit = circuit

## Serializer (core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala)

- `private[chisel3] object Serializer` — a package-private singleton.
- `val version = "7.0.0"` — the FIRRTL version emitted.
- Public entry: `def lazily(circuit: Circuit, annotations: Seq[Annotation]): Iterable[String]` (line 830) returns a lazy `Iterable[String]`. Called by `ElaboratedCircuit.lazilySerialize` (ElaboratedCircuit.scala:87), which is what `emitCHIRRTL` ultimately uses (via `elaboratedCircuit.serialize(inFileAnnos)` at ChiselStage.scala:112, where `serialize` = `lazilySerialize.mkString`).

Wait, let me trace this more carefully. `emitCHIRRTL` calls `elaboratedCircuit.get.serialize(inFileAnnos)` (line 112). `serialize(annotations)` = `lazilySerialize(annotations).mkString` (ElaboratedCircuit.scala:75). `lazilySerialize(annotations)` = `Serializer.lazily(circuit, annotations.toSeq)` (line 87). 

So the chain: `emitCHIRRTL` → `ElaboratedCircuit.serialize` → `Serializer.lazily(circuit, annos)` → returns lazy `Iterable[String]` → `.mkString`.

- The dispatch structure of `serialize`:
  1. `serialize(circuit: Circuit, annotations: Seq[Annotation]): Iterator[String]` (line 781) — top-level. Emits the prelude `FIRRTL version 7.0.0\n circuit NAME :`, optional annotations as `%[...JSON...]`, options, typeAliases, layers, domains, then iterates components (modules) via `serialize(component, typeAliases)`.
  2. `serialize(component: Component, typeAliases): Iterator[String]` (line 638) — matches on `DefModule` / `DefBlackBox` / `DefIntrinsicModule` / `DefClass` / `DefTestMarker`. For DefModule: emit `module NAME :`, ports (each via `serialize(port, ...)`), then body via `serialize(block, ...)`.
  3. `serialize(block: Block, ctx, typeAliases): Iterator[String]` (line 465) — iterates `block.getCommands()` + secret commands, flat-mapping each through `serializeCommand`.
  4. `serializeCommand(cmd, ctx, typeAliases): Iterator[String]` (line 377) — handles the **structural/nested** commands: `When`, `LayerBlock`, `Placeholder`, `DefContract`. Everything else delegates to `serializeSimpleCommand`. Returns an `Iterator[String]` (one or more lines) because nested structures like `when` expand into multiple indented lines.
  5. `serializeSimpleCommand(cmd, ctx, typeAliases)` (line 204) — handles all the **leaf** commands: `DefPrim`, `DefWire`, `DefReg`, `DefRegInit`, `DefMemory`, `DefSeqMemory`, `FirrtlMemory`, `DefMemPort`, `Connect`, `PropAssign`, `Attach`, `DefInvalid`, `DefInstance`, `Stop`, `Printf`, etc. These produce a single line.
  6. `serialize(arg: Arg, ctx, info): Unit` (line 116) — serializes **expressions/references**: `Node`, `Ref`, `Slot`, `Index`, `ModuleIO`, `ULit`, `SLit`, `ILit`, `PrimExpr`, `ProbeExpr`, etc. Appends to the StringBuilder `b`.

- The three layers: Command → Component → Circuit (matches u4-l2's IR tree). Serializer has a dedicated method per layer: `serialize(Circuit)`, `serialize(Component)`, `serialize(Block)`/`serializeCommand` (Command).

- Indentation via implicit `indent: Int` and `StringBuilder b`. `doIndent(inc)` writes `Indent` ("  ") `indent + inc` times. `newLineAndIndent(inc)` writes a newline then indents.

- `legalize(name)` (line 39): wraps names starting with a digit in backticks to make legal FIRRTL identifiers.

- `serialize(info: SourceInfo)` (line 66): emits the ` @[file line col]` source locator (suppressed if `suppressSourceInfo`).

- `serializeType` (line 501): serializes a `Data` type into FIRRTL type syntax (`UInt<8>`, `SInt`, `Clock`, bundles `{ a : UInt<8>, flip b : ... }`, Vecs `...[4]`, probes, const, properties).

- The "node" text vs DefPrim: When you write `a + b`, Chisel pushes a `DefPrim(AddOp)`. The Serializer's `serializeSimpleCommand` case `DefPrim[_]` (line 209) emits `node NAME = op(args)`. So in CHIRRTL text, every primitive op appears as a `node` line, but the IR class is `DefPrim`, NOT `DefNode`. This is the key clarification for the practice task. Connect (line 272) → `connect loc, exp`.

- `ULit` serialization (line 134): `UInt<W>(0hXXX)`. `SLit` (line 140): `SInt<W>(-0hXXX)`.

- `serializePrim` (line 104): `op(arg1, arg2)`.

## Printable (core/src/main/scala/chisel3/Printable.scala + PrintableHelper in package.scala)

- `sealed abstract class Printable` (line 50) — superclass of things printable in the circuit (mainly printf/Stop/Verification messages).
- Core method: `def unpack: (String, Seq[Data])` (line 65) — returns a FIRRTL printf format string + the Data arguments.
- Subclasses: `PString(str)`, `Printables(pables)` (a list, supports `+` concatenation), `FirrtlFormat` family (`Decimal`/`Hexadecimal`/`Binary`/`Character` with `%d/%x/%b/%c`), `Name(data)` (`%n`), `FullName(data)` (`%N`), `Percent` (`%%`), `HierarchicalModuleName` (`%m`), `SimulationTime` (`%T`).
- `Printable.pack(fmt, data*)` (line 80) — packs a printf-style format string into a Printable. Used by `printf("...", args)`.
- `Printable.resolve(pable, ctx)` (line 199) — resolves Chisel-time printables (Name → actual ref name string, FullName → full name) into PStrings, leaving FIRRTL-time ones alone.
- `Serializer.unpack(pable, ctx, sourceInfo)` (line 86) — the bridge: resolves the Printable, calls `.unpack` to get `(fmt, data)`, then maps data to `Arg` refs → `(String, Seq[Arg])`. Used by Printf/Stop/Verification serialization.

- `PrintableHelper` (package.scala:168) — implicit class on `StringContext` providing:
  - `p"..."` (line 173): escapes `%` to `%%` then delegates to `cf`.
  - `cf"..."` (line 230): the enhanced `f` interpolator that converts each `$arg` to a Printable based on format specifier (`%n`→Name, `%N`→FullName, `%d/%x/%b/%c`→FirrtlFormat for Bits, default→`Data.toPrintable`).

Now I have enough. Let me write the lecture. I'll keep code snippets short and provide permalinks.

The permalink base is: https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/

input.content:
# IR 序列化：Serializer

## 1. 本讲目标

本讲承接 [u4-l2 命令记录与内部 FIRRTL IR](u4-l2-internal-firrtl-ir.md)，回答一个具体问题：**elaboration 期间长出来的那棵 Scala 对象树（Circuit ⊃ Component ⊃ Command），是怎么变成你在屏幕上看到的 CHIRRTL 文本的？**

学完后你应当能够：

1. 说清 `Serializer` 这个对象的分发结构：它如何按 IR 的三层（Circuit / Component / Command）逐层调用不同的 `serialize` 方法。
2. 看懂任意一条命令（如 `Connect`、`DefPrim`、`DefRegInit`）在源码中被翻译成哪一行 CHIRRTL 文本。
3. 区分一个容易混淆的点：CHIRRTL 文本里的 `node` 关键字，对应的是 Chisel 内部 IR 的 **`DefPrim`** 节点，而不是一个叫 `DefNode` 的类。
4. 理解 `printf(p"...")` 背后的 `Printable` / `PrintableHelper` 格式化机制，以及它和 `Serializer` 的衔接点。
5. 亲手用 `ChiselStage.emitCHIRRTL` 生成一段 CHIRRTL，并回到 `Serializer.scala` 找到生成它的那几行代码。

---

## 2. 前置知识

在进入源码前，先建立三个直觉。

### 2.1 什么是 CHIRRTL

FIRRTL 是一种硬件中间表示语言，有自己的文本语法。**CHIRRTL**（Chisel FIRRTL）是 FIRRTL 的一个超集/方言，多了一些「Chisel 私有」的语法（例如 `cmem`/`smem` 内存、`mport` 内存端口、`printf`/`stop` 等），这些是 Chisel elaboration 的直接产物，下游 CIRCT（firtool）会把它们规整成标准 FIRRTL 再生成 Verilog。

你用 `ChiselStage.emitCHIRRTL(...)` 看到的文本，就是 `Serializer` 的输出。

### 2.2 序列化 = 模式匹配 + 拼 StringBuilder

`Serializer` 没有「先构造一棵语法树再 pretty-print」的设计，而是最朴素的写法：**对每一种 IR 节点写一个 `case` 分支，分支里直接往一个 `StringBuilder` 里追加字符**。整体看像一张巨大的「节点类型 → 文本片段」对照表。

这种写法的优点是直白、易对照；代价是 `Serializer.scala` 是个近 830 行的大对象，但只要抓住它的**分发骨架**（见 4.1），就不会迷路。

### 2.3 Printable 是什么

硬件里有些节点需要携带「格式化文本」，最典型的是 `printf` 的格式串。`Printable` 是这些文本片段的抽象基类，它不是「立即算出一个字符串」，而是**延迟到序列化时**才把格式串和数据引用拆开（`unpack`）。这与 `Serializer` 在第 4.3 节会合流。

> 关键术语复习（来自 u4-l2）：`Command`（命令）是对已有信号做动作或定义新硬件；`Definition` 是带 `id`/`name` 的 `Command` 子类；`Arg` 是表达式/引用（如 `Node`、`Ref`、`ULit`、`PrimExpr`）。

---

## 3. 本讲源码地图

| 文件 | 作用 |
|------|------|
| [core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala) | 本讲主角。把内部 IR 序列化成 CHIRRTL 文本的全部逻辑。 |
| [core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/IR.scala](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/IR.scala) | 被序列化的 IR 节点定义（`Circuit`/`Component`/`Command`/`Arg` 等）。对照阅读才能知道每个 `case` 匹配的是什么。 |
| [core/src/main/scala/chisel3/Printable.scala](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/Printable.scala) | `Printable` 抽象及其子类（`PString`/`Decimal`/`Name` 等），`printf` 格式化的核心。 |
| [core/src/main/scala/chisel3/package.scala](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/package.scala) | 提供 `PrintableHelper` 隐式类，即 `p"..."` / `cf"..."` 字符串插值器。 |
| [core/src/main/scala/chisel3/ElaboratedCircuit.scala](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/ElaboratedCircuit.scala) | `Serializer.lazily` 的调用方，是用户 API（`emitCHIRRTL`）与 `Serializer` 之间的桥。 |
| [src/main/scala/circt/stage/ChiselStage.scala](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/src/main/scala/circt/stage/ChiselStage.scala) | 用户入口 `emitCHIRRTL`，最终走到序列化。 |

---

## 4. 核心概念与源码讲解

### 4.1 序列化的整体架构：三层分发

#### 4.1.1 概念说明

`Serializer` 是一个 `private[chisel3] object`（包私有单例），它**对内**消费 Chisel 的内部 IR 树，**对外**产出 CHIRRTL 文本。

回忆 u4-l2 的结论：内部 IR 是三层树 `Circuit ⊃ Component ⊃ Command`。`Serializer` 的设计恰好**为每一层配备了一个 `serialize` 方法**，逐层下钻：

- `serialize(circuit: Circuit, annotations)` —— 顶层电路
- `serialize(component: Component, typeAliases)` —— 模块（`DefModule`/`DefBlackBox`/…）
- `serialize(block: Block, ctx, typeAliases)` + `serializeCommand(...)` —— 模块体内的命令

最底层是 `serialize(arg: Arg, ...)`，负责把**表达式/引用**（`Node`、`ULit`、`PrimExpr`…）拼成文本。所以整张分发图是：

```
serialize(Circuit)              → 电路头 + 逐个模块
  └─ serialize(Component)       → "module NAME :" + 端口 + 体
       └─ serialize(Block)      → 遍历命令
            └─ serializeCommand → when/layerblock 等嵌套结构，其余转交
                 └─ serializeSimpleCommand → 单行命令（connect/node/wire/…）
                      └─ serialize(Arg)    → 表达式（add(a,b)、字面量、引用）
```

公共入口是 `Serializer.lazily`：它返回一个**惰性的** `Iterable[String]`，每段字符串是 CHIRRTL 的一行（或多行）。惰性是为了降低峰值内存、并支持超过 2 GiB 的超大电路。

#### 4.1.2 核心流程

整个序列化从用户调用到文本，链路如下（粗箭头表示调用）：

1. 用户写 `ChiselStage.emitCHIRRTL(new MyMod)`。
2. `emitCHIRRTL` 跑完 Phase 管道，拿到 `ElaboratedCircuit`，调用 `elaboratedCircuit.serialize(annos)`。
3. `ElaboratedCircuit.serialize` 等价于 `lazilySerialize(annos).mkString`。
4. `lazilySerialize` 调用 `Serializer.lazily(circuit, annos)`。
5. `Serializer.lazily` 返回惰性 `Iterable[String]`，`mkString` 拼成最终字符串。

关键设计点：**所有 `serialize` 方法都返回 `Iterator[String]`**（除表达式层直接写 `StringBuilder`）。用 `Iterator` 而非提前拼好 `String`，是为了让超大电路可以「流式」产出，不一次性占用整段内存。`Serializer` 内部用 `implicit b: StringBuilder` 与 `implicit indent: Int` 两个隐式参数在线程内传递「当前输出缓冲」与「当前缩进层级」。

#### 4.1.3 源码精读

对象本体与版本声明。`Serializer` 支持的 FIRRTL 版本写死为 `7.0.0`，会作为文本第一行输出：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:24-29](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L24-L29) —— `private[chisel3] object Serializer`，常量 `NewLine`/`Indent` 与 `val version = "7.0.0"`。

公共入口 `lazily`，用一个匿名 `Iterable` 包裹真正的 `serialize(circuit, annotations)` 迭代器，实现惰性：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:830-832](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L830-L832) —— `def lazily(circuit, annotations): Iterable[String]`，`iterator = serialize(circuit, annotations)`。

调用方在 `ElaboratedCircuit` 的实现里，一行就能把电路交给 `Serializer`：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/ElaboratedCircuit.scala:73-88](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/ElaboratedCircuit.scala#L73-L88) —— `serialize` 即 `lazilySerialize.mkString`，而 `lazilySerialize` 调 `Serializer.lazily(circuit, annotations.toSeq)`。

顶层 `serialize(Circuit)` 负责电路「头」：先输出 `FIRRTL version 7.0.0` 与 `circuit NAME :`，若有注解则追加 `%[...JSON...]`，再依次拼上 options、type aliases、layers、domains，最后遍历 `circuit.components`（即所有模块）：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:781-828](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L781-L828) —— `private def serialize(circuit: Circuit, annotations)`，先写 prelude，再用 `prelude ++ options ++ typeAliases ++ layers ++ domains ++ 各模块` 串成一条迭代器链。

模块层 `serialize(Component)` 按 `DefModule`/`DefBlackBox`/`DefIntrinsicModule`/`DefClass`/`DefTestMarker` 分别处理。最常见的 `DefModule` 分支输出 `module NAME :`，随后逐个序列化端口，再交给 `serialize(block, ...)` 处理模块体：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:643-657](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L643-L657) —— `DefModule` 分支：写头、写端口（含 `secretPorts`）、空行，再 `Iterator(start) ++ serialize(block, ctx, typeAliases)`。

#### 4.1.4 代码实践（源码阅读型）

1. **目标**：在脑中建立「一个 `module` 块从上到下是怎么被拼出来的」的完整路径。
2. **步骤**：
   - 打开 `Serializer.scala`，定位 4.1.3 列出的四个方法（`lazily` / `serialize(Circuit)` / `serialize(Component)` 的 `DefModule` 分支 / `serialize(Block)`）。
   - 在 [IR.scala:596-603](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/IR.scala#L596-L603) 确认 `DefModule` 持有 `ports: Seq[Port]` 与 `block: Block`。
3. **观察现象**：注意 `DefModule` 分支里 `(ports ++ ctx.secretPorts).foreach` 与两处 `newLineNoIndent()`，理解端口声明和模块体之间的空行从何而来。
4. **预期结果**：你能用一句话说出「`module Foo :` 这一行加上它下面的端口和命令，分别由 `serialize(Component)` 和 `serialize(Block)` 两个方法产出」。

#### 4.1.5 小练习与答案

**练习 1**：为什么 `serialize` 各方法返回 `Iterator[String]` 而不直接返回 `String`？

> **答案**：为了让超大电路可以「流式」逐行产出，避免一次性把整段 CHIRRTL（可能超过 2 GiB）驻留内存。`Serializer.lazily` 返回的惰性 `Iterable[String]` 正是建立在这些 `Iterator` 之上。

**练习 2**：电路文本第一行的 `FIRRTL version 7.0.0` 来自哪里？

> **答案**：来自 [Serializer.scala:29](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L29) 的 `val version = "7.0.0"`，由 `serialize(Circuit)` 的 prelude 在 [第 786 行](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L786) 拼出。

### 4.2 命令与表达式的文本化规则

#### 4.2.1 概念说明

模块体里的每一条 `Command` 都要变成一行（或多行）CHIRRTL。`Serializer` 把命令分成两类处理：

- **嵌套型命令**（`When`、`LayerBlock`、`Placeholder`、`DefContract`）：它们内部还套着一段 `Block`，会展开成带缩进的多行文本。这类在 `serializeCommand` 里**就地**处理，并通过递归把 `indent + 1` 传给子命令。
- **单行型命令**（`Connect`、`DefPrim`、`DefWire`、`DefReg`、`DefRegInit`、`DefMemory`、`Printf`、`Stop`…）：只产生一行，统一交给 `serializeSimpleCommand`。

表达式层 `serialize(Arg)` 则负责命令内部出现的「右值」，例如 `connect a, add(b, c)` 里的 `add(b, c)`。

> ⚠️ **本讲最重要的辨析**：你在 CHIRRTL 里频繁看到 `node _T = add(a, b)` 这样的行，这里的 `node` 关键字对应的内部 IR 节点是 **`DefPrim`**（原语运算定义），**并不是**一个叫 `DefNode` 的类。如 u4-l2 所述，`DefNode` 是**下游** FIRRTL IR 的节点名，Chisel 内部用 `DefPrim` 表达原语运算，文本里的 `node` 只是 `Serializer` 给 `DefPrim` 起的「行首词」。这是初读源码最容易卡住的地方。

#### 4.2.2 核心流程

以一个简单模块为例，把 Chisel 代码、内部 IR 节点、序列化文本三者对齐：

```scala
class Adder extends Module {
  val io = IO(new Bundle { val a = Input(UInt(8.W)); val b = Input(UInt(8.W)); val y = Output(UInt(8.W)) })
  io.y := io.a + io.b
}
```

`io.a + io.b` 会产生一个 `DefPrim(AddOp)`，`io.y := ...` 产生一个 `Connect`。序列化后的模块体大致是：

```
node _T = add(io.a, io.b)        ; 来自 DefPrim
connect io.y, _T                  ; 来自 Connect
```

文本化的几条通用规则：

- 每个 `Definition` 都有 `name`（取自 `id.getRef.name`），序列化时先写「行首词 + 名字」。
- 缩进由隐式 `indent: Int` 控制；`doIndent(inc)` 写 `indent + inc` 个 `"  "`。
- 标识符合法化 `legalize`：以数字开头的名字加反引号。
- 源信息 `@[file line]` 由 `serialize(info)` 追加，可被 `suppressSourceInfo` 关闭。

#### 4.2.3 源码精读

命令分发的总入口。注意它只显式处理「嵌套型」四种，**其余全部 fall through 到 `serializeSimpleCommand`**：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:377-454](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L377-L454) —— `serializeCommand`，先 `case When` / `LayerBlock` / `Placeholder` / `DefContract`，最后 `case simple => serializeSimpleCommand(simple, ...)`。

`When` 分支最能体现「嵌套展开成多行 + 缩进」的思路：它把 `when <pred> :` 当作 `start`，把 then 区命令递归（缩进 +1）当作 `middle`，把 `else :` 与 else 区当作 `end`，三者用 `++` 拼成一条迭代器：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:382-406](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L382-L406) —— `case When(info, pred, ifRegion, elseRegion)`：then 区为空时输出 `skip`，否则递归 `serializeCommand` 并把缩进加 1。

单行命令的「大表」。这里摘关键的几条对照：

- **`DefPrim`**（原语运算 → 文本 `node name = op(args)`）：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:209-212](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L209-L212) —— `case e: DefPrim[_] =>` 写 `"node " + name + " = "`，再调 `serializePrim(e.op, e.args, ...)`，最后追加源信息。这就是 `add`/`mul`/`and` 等运算在文本里以 `node` 开头的原因。

- **`Connect`**（连线 → 文本 `connect loc, exp`）：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:272-273](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L272-L273) —— `case Connect(info, loc, exp)`：`"connect "` + 序列化左值 + `", "` + 序列化右值。

- **`DefWire`**（线网 → `wire name : <type>`）、**`DefReg`**（寄存器 → `reg name : <type>, <clock>`）、**`DefRegInit`**（带复位寄存器 → `regreset ...`）：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:213-237](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L213-L237) —— 三条相邻分支，类型部分统一交给 `serializeType(...)`。

- **`DefMemory` / `DefSeqMemory`**（内存 → `cmem`/`smem`），这是 CHIRRTL 私有语法（呼应 u3-l6 的 `Mem`/`SyncReadMem`）：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:238-247](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L238-L247) —— `cmem`/`smem`，末尾 `[size]`，`DefSeqMemory` 还会写 `readUnderWrite`。

表达式/引用层 `serialize(Arg)`。这里把右值拆成最小片段。几个常见分支：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:116-166](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L116-L166) —— `serialize(arg: Arg, ctx, info)`，逐个 `case`：`Node` 取 ref、`Ref` 直接写名字、`Slot` 写 `imm.name`、`Index` 写 `imm[idx]`、`ULit` 写 `UInt<W>(0h..)` 等。

其中无符号字面量与有符号字面量的文本规则，是「一眼看懂 CHIRRTL 字面量」的钥匙：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:134-148](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L134-L148) —— `ULit(n, w)` → `UInt<W>(0h十六进制)`，未知宽度时用 `minWidth`；`SLit(n, w)` → `SInt<W>(-0h十六进制)`，负数前加 `-`。

原语表达式的拼装（`add(a, b)` 这种），由 `serializePrim` 负责，它是 `serialize(Arg)` 里 `case e: PrimExpr[_]` 的实现：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:104-114](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L104-L114) —— `serializePrim`：写 `op.name + '('`，参数间用 `", "` 连接，最后 `')'`。

辅助工具：合法化名字与缩进。

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:39-43](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L39-L43) —— `legalize`：名字以数字开头时加反引号，保证是合法 FIRRTL 标识符。

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:53-55](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L53-L55) —— `doIndent`：写 `indent + inc` 个 `Indent`（两个空格）。

最后别忘了**类型序列化** `serializeType`，它把 `UInt(8.W)` 变成 `UInt<8>`、把 `Bundle` 变成 `{ a : UInt<8>, flip b : ... }`。`DefWire`/`DefReg`/端口声明都依赖它：

[core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala:501-572](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L501-L572) —— `serializeType`：按 `Data` 子类型分发，`UInt`/`SInt` 调 `serialize(width)` 追加 `<W>`，`Record` 输出花括号聚合，`Vec` 末尾追加 `[length]`，并处理 Probe/const/Property。

#### 4.2.4 代码实践（动手验证型，本讲主实践）

这是本讲的核心实践，来自规格要求。

1. **目标**：用 `ChiselStage.emitCHIRRTL` 生成一段 CHIRRTL，再回到 `Serializer.scala` 找到产出每一行的那段代码，亲手验证「文本 ↔ 源码」的对应关系。
2. **操作步骤**：
   - 在一个能引用 Chisel 的环境（Scala REPL 或一个最小 `mill`/`sbt` 模块）里运行下面的**示例代码**：

     ```scala
     // 示例代码：非项目原有代码，仅用于演示
     import chisel3._
     class Adder extends Module {
       val io = IO(new Bundle {
         val a = Input(UInt(8.W))
         val b = Input(UInt(8.W))
         val y = Output(UInt(8.W))
       })
       io.y := io.a + io.b   // 产生 DefPrim(AddOp) 与 Connect
     }
     println(ChiselStage.emitCHIRRTL(new Adder))
     ```
   - 打开 [Serializer.scala:204-273](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L204-L273)，对照输出文本逐行找源头。
3. **观察现象**：输出大致长这样（端口顺序、临时名 `_T` 可能因版本略有差异）：

   ```
   module Adder :
     input clock : Clock
     input reset : Reset
     output io : { a : UInt<8>, b : UInt<8>, y : UInt<8>}
     ...
     node _T = add(io.a, io.b)
     connect io.y, _T
   ```
4. **预期结果**：
   - `node _T = add(io.a, io.b)` 这一行，由 [Serializer.scala:209-212](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L209-L212) 的 `DefPrim` 分支 + [serializePrim](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L104-L114) 产出。**确认文本里的 `node` 对应的 IR 类是 `DefPrim`，而非 `DefNode`。**
   - `connect io.y, _T` 由 [Serializer.scala:272-273](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L272-L273) 的 `Connect` 分支产出。
   - 端口类型 `{ a : UInt<8>, ...}` 由 [serializeType](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L540-L567) 的 `Record` 分支产出。
5. **若无法运行**：标注「待本地验证」。即便不运行，你也可以静态地把上面的输出文本与 4.2.3 的源码片段一一对应。

#### 4.2.5 小练习与答案

**练习 1**：把 `io.y := io.a + io.b` 改成 `io.y := (io.a + io.b) & io.a`，生成的 CHIRRTL 会多出哪一行？它由哪个 `case` 产出？

> **答案**：会多一行 `node _T_1 = and(_T, io.a)`（名字可能略有不同）。`add` 那行由 `DefPrim` 产出，新增的 `and` 同样由 [Serializer.scala:209-212](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L209-L212) 的 `DefPrim` 产出，运算名 `and` 来自 [IR.scala:40](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/IR.scala#L40) 的 `BitAndOp = PrimOp("and")`。

**练习 2**：`5.U(8.W)` 在 CHIRRTL 里长什么样？为什么？

> **答案**：`UInt<8>(0h5)`。由 [Serializer.scala:134-139](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L134-L139) 的 `ULit` 分支产出：`UInt<` + 宽度 + `>(0h` + `n.toString(16)` + `)`。

**练习 3**：为什么 `when` 块需要 `serializeCommand` 单独处理，而不能进 `serializeSimpleCommand`？

> **答案**：因为 `when` 内部套着一段 `Block`，会展开成「`when pred :` + 若干缩进的子命令 + 可选 `else :` + 子命令」的多行结构，且子命令要把缩进层级加 1。`serializeSimpleCommand` 只产出单行，无法表达嵌套，所以 `When`（以及 `LayerBlock`、`DefContract`）在 [serializeCommand:382-406](https://github.com/chipsalliance/chisel/blob/b2a0e030da9a3e90b8221436b5317afb370f3347/core/src/main/scala/chisel3/internal/firrtl/Serializer.scala#L382-L406) 里递归处理。
